{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Book of Eternal Night
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[The Book of Eternal Night Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Book of Eternal Night is a unique [[Divine Treasure]] crafted by the [[Akura Monarch]], [[Malice]]. Unlike other books left by [[Akura]] experts that contain seven pages and techniques for descendants to test their worth, this specific book was designed by [[Malice]] as an idealized version of her own shadow Path. It serves as a guide to the perfect path she desired for herself, containing seven powerful techniques that would be suitable for a future [[Monarch]]. The book manifests as a thick, bright violet tome featuring spinning script-circles on its cover. It is deeply connected to the spirit of its user, [[Mercy]], who carries it as one of her primary implements. Each of its seven pages contains a mental and spiritual space shaped by [[Malice]]'s will and memories. These spaces serve as training grounds or repositories for specific abilities; for example, the fifth page is a nightmare-filled [[labyrinth]] that houses the [[Dream of Darkness]] technique. While [[Mercy]] has used the book's resources to accelerate her growth, the pages also function as a means to unleash potent techniques, such as [[Overlord]] [[madra]]. The book is intended to prepare a practitioner for the highest levels of power, potentially guiding them toward the rank of [[Herald]].}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is the first book, crafted by [[Akura Malice]] for her successor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] surrounds [[Mercy]] when she uses its power.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is an item held by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] pulls four techniques from the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is a [[Divine Treasure]] with spinning script on its cover.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] contains techniques considered powerful enough for a future [[Monarch]] by [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] has at least five pages.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is an idealized version of the [[Path]] of Eternal Night created by [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is a [[Divine Treasure]] that materializes over [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Book of Eternal Night is a violet tome characterized by spinning [[scripts]] upon its cover. Serving as an idealized version of [[Malice]]'s [[Path]], the book possesses the unique property of being modifiable. Certain pages within its contents are protected, requiring specific abilities to be accessed. [[Mercy]] eventually manifested this particular book during her journey.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is an idealized version of [[Malice]]'s [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] can be modified.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] contains pages that require specific abilities to access.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] manifested her Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is a violet tome with spinning [[scripts]] on the cover.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Book of Eternal Night is a collection of separate [[construct]] pages designed to contain [[Malice's ideal Path]] and her memories and will on every page. While some pages serve as training tools, the sixth page functions as a room used to teach [[Mercy]] a technique and prepare her for [[Archlord]]. The book is compatible with [[Mercy]]'s spirit, allowing [[Lindon]] to separate her from the object as she studies it and adapts to its contents. Through the book, [[Mercy]] absorbed [[Malice]]'s instincts and accessed the authority she borrowed from her mother. Ultimately, the seventh page manifests as a battlefield suffused with [[Mercy]]'s spirit and will, though the book is destined to end at [[Monarch]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] contains pages used for training.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] contains [[Malice]]'s will and memories on every page.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] contains pages that are separate constructs.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is compatible with [[Mercy]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] is an object [[Lindon]] can separate [[Mercy]] from.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is adapting to the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] was studying her Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The sixth page of the Book of Eternal Night was one room used to prepare [[Mercy]] for [[Archlord]] and teach her a technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]'s instincts were absorbed from the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] contains the authority [[Mercy]] borrowed from her mother.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] was meant to contain [[Malice]]’s ideal [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] must end at [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The seventh page of the Book of Eternal Night is a battlefield where [[Mercy]]'s will and spirit suffuse.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] uses the resources in her Book of Eternal Night to fuel her growth.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|"I will not turn Mercy over," Lindon said. "But I will separate her from the Book of Eternal Night and return that to you."<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
